label: Brother: Ask AI
args: RESPONSE=$(curl -s --max-time 60 -G --data-urlencode "request=${ZED_SELECTED_TEXT:-What can you help me with?}" http://localhost:8001/v1/omni/reason 2>&1) && echo "$RESPONSE" | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || echo "$RESPONSE" || echo 'ERROR: Brother AI API is not accessible. Run: ollama serve && uvicorn app:app --port 8001'

label: Brother: Explain This Code
args: curl -s --max-time 120 -G --data-urlencode "request=Explain this code in detail:\n${ZED_SELECTED_TEXT}" http://localhost:8001/v1/omni/reason | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || echo 'ERROR: Brother AI API is not accessible.'

label: Brother: Generate Unit Tests
args: curl -s --max-time 120 -G --data-urlencode "request=Generate comprehensive unit tests for this function:\n${ZED_SELECTED_TEXT}" http://localhost:8001/v1/omni/reason | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || echo 'ERROR: Brother AI API is not accessible.'

label: Brother: Find Security Issues
args: curl -s --max-time 120 -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"input": "'"${ZED_SELECTED_TEXT}"'"}' http://localhost:8001/v1/security/scan | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || echo 'ERROR: Brother AI API is not accessible.'

label: Brother: Translate to Shell Command
args: curl -s --max-time 60 -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"input": "'"${ZED_SELECTED_TEXT}"'"}' http://localhost:8001/v1/translate/nl2cmd | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || echo 'ERROR: Brother AI API is not accessible.'
